lede: A look at October 16 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Günter Grass and Inna, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Lao Airlines Flight 301
events.desc: Lao Airlines Flight 301 crashes on approach to Pakse International Airport in Laos, killing 49 people.

events.title: Augusto Pinochet
events.desc: Former Chilean dictator Augusto Pinochet is arrested in London on a murder extradition warrant.

events.title: Project 596
events.desc: China detonates its first nuclear weapon.

events.title: Cuba
events.desc: Cuban revolutionary Fidel Castro delivers his "History Will Absolve Me" speech, and is sentenced to 15 years' imprisonment by the Fulgencio Batista government for leading an attack on the Moncada Barracks.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: No. 603 Squadron RAF intercepts the first Luftwaffe raid on Britain.

events.title: Walt Disney
events.desc: Walt Disney and his brother, Roy, found the Disney Brothers Cartoon Studio, today known as The Walt Disney Company.

events.title: Margaret Sanger
events.desc: Margaret Sanger opens the first family planning clinic in the United States.

events.title: Brigham Young University
events.desc: Brigham Young University is founded in Provo, Utah.

events.title: Jadwiga of Poland
events.desc: Jadwiga is crowned King of Poland, although she is a woman.

events.title: Wu Zetian
events.desc: Empress Wu Zetian ascends to the throne of the Tang dynasty and proclaims herself ruler of the Chinese Empire.

births.name: Günter Grass
births.line: German novelist, poet, playwright, Nobel Prize laureate

births.name: Hema Malini
births.line: Indian actress, director, producer, and politician

births.name: David Ben-Gurion
births.line: Polish-Israeli soldier and politician, 1st Prime Minister of Israel

births.name: Enver Hoxha
births.line: Albanian general and politician, Prime Minister of Albania

deaths.text: Martti Ahtisaari, former President of Finland and Nobel Prize laureate
Daphne Caruana Galizia, Maltese journalist and blogger
Alfred Jodl, German general and war criminal
Marie Antoinette, Austrian-born queen consort of Louis XVI of France

observances.text: Christian feast day: Colmán of Kilroot (Colman mac Cathbaid)
